results.title: BBQ Healthy Kitchen Cooking Oil Vinegar Spray Bottle Push Type Oil Spray BottleP

payload.title: BBQ Healthy Kitchen Cooking Oil Vinegar Spray Bottle Push Type Oil Spray BottleP
payload.descriptionHtml:
Overview:

1. It is suitable for oil, vinegar, soy sauce, lemon juice or wine. It needs to squeeze the pump several times for the first use.
2. This is a perfect spray-type vinegar oil bottle, instead of using a brush for oiling during roasting, frying, baking, and cooking, and does not contain any harmful propellants or chemical substances.
3. Easy to clean, unscrew the lid, just fill the bottle with hot water and a drop of mild detergent, and then press the spray control button without stirring.


Notes:
1. Due to the different monitor and light effect, the actual color of the item might be slightly different from the color showed on the pictures. Thank you!
2. Please allow slight measuring deviation due to manual measurement.
3.Clean and dry with detergent for the first time of use, and let it dry in a cool place.


Specifications:
Product Name: ABS + glass oil and a vinegar spray bottle
Material: ABS+high white glass
Size: 4cm in diameter, 17.5cm in height, single capacity 100ml


Package Content:
1 x Spray Bottle

warnings: Mapped by eBay taxonomy suggestion: Oil & Vinegar Dispensers.
Mapped by eBay taxonomy suggestion: Oil & Vinegar Dispensers.

results.title: Party Sequins Off-neck Split Dress INS Casual Fashion Dress Women Charming Slimm

payload.title: Party Sequins Off-neck Split Dress INS Casual Fashion Dress Women Charming Slimm
payload.descriptionHtml:
Overview:
Unique design, stylish and beautiful.
Good material, High quality.
100% Brand New.
A variety of colors, any choice.
Comfortable to wear.


Product information:
Pattern: solid color
Skirt-type: super large swing skirt
Color: wine red, black, silver, peacock blue, Champagne
Waist Type: Mid waist
Size: S,M,L,XL
Style type: Japanese and Korean casual
Combination form: Single piece
Skirt length: long skirt
Popular elements: zipper
Style: Tube top
Fabric name: Sequins
Sleeve type: sleeveless
Main fabric composition: Polyester (polyester fiber)
Sleeve length: sleeveless
 

Size:
 


Note: 
 1. Asian sizes are 1 to 2 sizes smaller than European and American people. Choose the larger size if your size between two sizes. Please allow 2-3cm differences due to manual measurement. 2. Please check the size chart carefully before you buy the item, if you don't know how to choose size, please contact our customer service. 3.As you know, the different computers display colors differently, the color of the actual item may vary slightly from the following images.


Packing list:
Dress X1

payload.descriptionHtml:
Key Attributes

Color Chocolate brown Wigs Length Type Long
Feature 100% Human Hair Lace Wig Type 13x4 Lace Front Wig

Density 150% Cap Size Average Size

 Color of Lace non-Remy Hair

Description

Density: 150%、180%

Hair Material: Best Selected Unprocessed Natural Human Hair

Hairline: Pre Plucked

Note:

1,Wig hair length, should be measured from the top of the hair to the bottom of the longest hair straightening, and conventional manual measurement please allow 1-3cm error, thank you!
